officials.name: Ernest Bickham Sweet Escott
officials.position: Governor and Commander-in-Chief; High Commissioner for the Western Pacific

officials.name: E. Castaldi
officials.position: Clerk and Shorthand Writer to Legislative Council

officials.name: R. S. D. Rankine
officials.position: Receiver-General, Commissioner of Stamps, and President Fiji Marine Board

officials.name: H. B. Ching
officials.position: Chief Clerk and Deputy Commissioner of Stamps

officials.name: E. F. Wallack
officials.position: Master S.Y. "Ranadi" and Inspector of Lighthouses

officials.name: Dyson Blair
officials.position: Commissioner of Lands (also Crown Surveyor, Conservator of Forests and Chairman Mining Board)

officials.name: E. W. Harness
officials.allowances: and quarters; receives also 50l. as Overseer, Nasova Gaol

officials.name: G. C. M. Davies
officials.position: Medical Officer of Health and Port Officer

officials.name: J. S. Macnair
officials.position: Sanitary Inspector, Central Board of Health

officials.name: Miss M. C. Anderson
officials.allowances: receives also 25l. as Matron, Public Lunatic Asylum, with quarters, board and uniform

officials.name: Miss E. P. Anderson
officials.allowances: receives also 10l. as Staff Nurse, Public Lunatic Asylum, with quarters, board and uniform

officials.name: C. A. Brabant
officials.allowances: with quarters and uniform; receives also 50l. allowance in lieu of board, and 30l. as Clerk

officials.name: G. R. Anderson
officials.allowances: receives also 50l. allowance in lieu of board, and personal allowance 25l., with quarters

officials.name: Mrs. A. Dobell
officials.allowances: receives also 50l. allowance in lieu of board, with quarters and uniform

officials.name: Roger Greene
officials.position: Registrar-General, Registrar of Titles, Registrar of Companies, Registrar of Supreme Court, Curator of Intestate and Vacant Estates, and Public Trustee

officials.name: Sir C. S. Davson
officials.position: Chief Justice and Judicial Commissioner for the Western Pacific

officials.name: E. Castaldi
officials.position: Clerk and Shorthand Writer to Supreme Court

officials.name: I. McOwan
officials.position: Sheriff; also Inspector-General of Constabulary and Prisons
